# Individual Essay — AI and Collective Intelligence

## Brief

Write a 2,500-word critical essay on one of the following topics:

1. To what extent does the "wisdom of crowds" hold in digitally mediated environments?
2. How do cognitive biases influence the design and outcomes of AI-assisted group decision-making?
3. Can AI systems be designed to mitigate rather than amplify social influence biases?

## Submission Details

- **Deadline:** Friday 25 April 2026, 23:59 GMT
- **Word count:** 2,500 words (±10%)
- **Submission:** Via Canvas assignment portal
- **Format:** PDF, 12pt font, double-spaced

## Marking Criteria

| Criterion | Weight |
|-----------|--------|
| Critical analysis and argumentation | 40% |
| Use of academic literature | 25% |
| Relevance to module themes | 20% |
| Clarity and structure | 15% |

## Extension Policy

Extensions are not granted by the module team. Students requiring an extension must apply through the formal mitigating circumstances process via the Student Hub. Informal extension requests will be directed to this process.

## Academic Integrity

All work must be original. AI-generated text must be declared and referenced appropriately per university policy.
